string.description: Text value for image names, commands, labels, and file paths in Dockerfile instructions

path.description: File system path for COPY, ADD source/destination and WORKDIR location

signal.description: Unix signal name used in STOPSIGNAL instruction to specify container stop signal

port.description: Network port with optional protocol used in EXPOSE instruction

ARG.description: Build-time variable that can be set with --build-arg and used in FROM and RUN

ENV.description: Environment variable persisted in the image and available at runtime

LABEL.description: Image metadata key-value pair for version, maintainer, and description
